actions.description: Nineteenth board meeting. 7 games live (Frogger shipped). 13 clean QA cycles, zero bugs, zero naming violations. Pivot vanilla-js-restructure at gate-1 but no proposal doc found. R&D pipeline empty — flagged as top risk.

nextStep: Next meeting: check R&D game #8 research, UX/UI game-over design doc, pivot proposal existence, new C-suite first reports.
